accepted.archetype_slot: Starly base-stage / flock-structure / Route 201 first-encounter (base-stage flock register that the line's apex departs from at evolution)
accepted.bullet_text: [[staraptor-line]] — base-stage member of the Starly to Staravia to Staraptor Sinnoh regional-bird line (National Pokedex no. 396, Normal/Flying-type). This print sits at the Starly base-stage / flock-structure slot the cohort node anchors: the Saya Tsuruta art renders the species' canonical 'small round bird in a hedgerow' visual register (perched among berry-laden shrubs, dark-grey-and-white plumage, the line's species-diagnostic palette enforced across every print), and the flavor text 'They flock around mountains and fields, chasing after bug Pokemon. Their singing is noisy and annoying' is the canonical collective-behavior signature characterized in the cohort body as Starly's 'flocking' register — the base-stage flock register that the line's apex stage departs from at evolution. [cohort node body: 'Starly canonically flocks']; [Scryfall/PokemonTCG.io flavor_text]

accepted.archetype_slot: Starly base-stage / flock-structure (with secondary attachment to the within-Darkness-Ablaze partial-triptych bookends pair with Staraptor DAA-147)
accepted.bullet_text: [[staraptor-line]] — base-stage member of the Starly to Staravia to Staraptor Sinnoh regional-bird line (National Pokedex no. 396, Normal/Flying-type). This print sits at the Starly base-stage / flock-structure slot the cohort node anchors: the Naoyo Kimura art renders the species' canonical perched-bird-in-foliage register (small round bird perched on a branch amid lush green foliage, the line's species-diagnostic plumage palette of dark wings + white facial marking + compact rounded body), and the flavor text 'They flock around mountains and fields, chasing after bug Pokemon. Their singing is noisy and annoying' is the canonical collective-behavior signature characterized in the cohort body as Starly's 'flocking' register — the base-stage flock register that the line's apex stage departs from at evolution. This card also pairs at the cohort level with [[147-189-staraptor]] as the within-Darkness-Ablaze partial-triptych bookends (collector slots 145 and 147 with the missing Staravia at the absent 146), per the cohort node's 'design thesis' framing of the DAA-145 + DAA-147 pair as the corpus's first Sinnoh-region within-set evolutionary-bookends pattern. [cohort node body: 'within-Darkness-Ablaze Starly DAA-145 + Staraptor DAA-147 adjacent-but-non-contiguous pair']; [PokemonTCG.io flavor_text]

accepted.archetype_slot: Staraptor apex-stage / leaves-the-flock / solo-emergence-from-collective (the cohort's primary design-thesis archetype)
accepted.bullet_text: [[staraptor-line]] — apex-stage member of the Starly to Staravia to Staraptor Sinnoh regional-bird line (National Pokedex no. 398, Normal/Flying-type). This print sits at the Staraptor apex-stage / leaves-the-flock / solo-emergence-from-collective slot — the cohort node's primary design-thesis archetype. The AKIRA EGAWA art renders the species' established raptor-in-flight visual register (mid-flight diving posture against a soft atmospheric sky gradient, the swept-back crest and species-diagnostic plumage palette), and the flavor text 'When Staravia evolve into Staraptor, they leave the flock to live alone. They have sturdy wings' is the canonical departure-from-cohort signature the cohort body characterizes as 'the species' designer-coordinated departure-from-cohort canonical narrative arc rendered as a species-level evolution event.' Mechanically, the Brave Bird attack (170 damage with 30 self-recoil) executes what the cohort body identifies as Staraptor's 'competitive identity' — the species' canonical Reckless-boosted recoil-attack signature carried from the mainline games into the TCG print at the canonical species level. This card also pairs at the cohort level with [[145-189-starly]] as the within-Darkness-Ablaze partial-triptych bookends, per the cohort node's 'design thesis' framing. [cohort node body: 'the franchise's most explicit species-level rendering of solo-emergence-from-collective as a maturation event']; [PokemonTCG.io flavor_text and Brave Bird attack]
